examples: To me, that would have been crucial; after all, I wouldn't tell a child there is no Santa Claus or why I am an atheist without a parent's permission.
But how do you spot an atheist?
I was an atheist at the time.
The journey from very devout Catholic to outspoken atheist took about six months total.
What's certain is that no one has taken over Madalyn's mantle as America's atheist Elmer Gantry.
